announcements.title: 🌊 April 14th Meeting Recap with City Stormwater & More 🌊
announcements.content: A huge thank you to everyone who joined us for our meeting with Jonas and Emiliee from City Stormwater! Key takeaways: Diamond Lake is scheduled for a fresh inspection in August 2026 that will determine our dredging priority. We also voted to increase dues to $50/year starting in 2027 and approved fishing guest passes ($5 daily, $25 yearly).
